- Oral (Discharge) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the patient was receiving oral chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
569 CHMTHRPY_OTHR_ADMSN_CD CHMTHRPY_OTHR_ADMSN_CD Treatment: Chemo - Other (Admission) CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of admission, the patient was receiving another form of chemotherapy. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
- = Not Assessed/No Information
